title: T1 Engine: durable verdict ledger + prior-chain — resume from disk, not transcripts
prompt: Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T1-16-durable-verdict-ledger.md move by move. Add engine/store/ledger.jsonl (append-only verdict lines with prior-chain) + embed the verdict in each settled ticket + a status.py --resume read; on failure apply counter-moves; on abort write needs-decision/.
verify: ledger.jsonl exists; status.py --resume reconstructs a re-attempted ticket's chain from disk with no transcript read; audit.jsonl writes unchanged.
